notes: No published OpenAPI/Swagger spec exists for the OpenHIM Core API. Authored by hand from the OpenHIM API docs, covering exactly the endpoints the adaptor calls: getTransactions (GET /transactions), getClients/createClient (GET,POST /clients), getChannels/createChannel (GET,POST /channels), getTasks/createTask (GET,POST /tasks). Added by-id GET variants for transactions/clients/channels since the adaptor passes an optional id. The real Core API is served over HTTPS on port 8080 and requires token/mutual-TLS auth; server URL is a local mock placeholder. Resource schemas (Transaction, Client, Channel, Route, Task) are focused subsets of the full OpenHIM Mongoose models.
